mapper.select: SELECT school_name AS schoolName, CASE WHEN school_type = 1 THEN '고등학교' WHEN school_type = 2 THEN '전문대' WHEN school_type = 3 THEN '대학교' WHEN school_type = 4 THEN '대학원' ELSE '기타' END AS schoolType, admit_graduate AS admitGraduate, entrance_ceremony AS entranceCeremony, major, learned_subject AS learnedSubject, description FROM Education ORDER BY school_type ASC
SELECT birthday, address, phone_number AS phoneNumber, image_ori_name AS imageOriName, image_path AS imagePath, image_upload_name AS imageUploadName FROM PersonalInfo
SELECT title, activity_start_date AS activityStartDate, activity_end_date AS activityEndDate, description FROM Activities
SELECT seq, name, step, acquired_date AS acquiredDate FROM Qualifications ORDER BY acquiredDate desc
SELECT seq, company_name AS companyName, belonging, position, work_start_date AS workStartDate, work_end_date AS workEndDate FROM Company ORDER BY workStartDate desc
SELECT title, description, company_seq AS companySeq FROM CompanyManaged
SELECT seq, title, project_start_date AS projectStartDate, project_end_date AS projectEndDate, description, company_seq AS companySeq FROM Project
SELECT seq, title, description, project_seq AS projectSeq FROM ProjectDescription
SELECT skill_name AS skillName FROM Skills
